name: ndb2
description: Nostradambot 2.0 Betting Game for the Off-Nominal Discord

scripts.dev: NODE_ENV=dev pnpm --filter @offnominal/ndb2-api-types build && concurrently "pnpm --filter @offnominal/ndb2-api-types dev" "pnpm --filter ndb2-api dev" "pnpm --filter ndb2-api sql-watch"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @offnominal/ndb2-api-types build && pnpm --filter @offnominal/ndb2-db build && pnpm --filter ndb2-api build
scripts.clean: pnpm --filter @offnominal/ndb2-api-types clear && pnpm --filter @offnominal/ndb2-db clear && pnpm --filter ndb2-api clear
scripts.test:unit: pnpm run build:test-deps && concurrently -n api,db "pnpm --filter ndb2-api test:unit" "pnpm --filter @offnominal/ndb2-db test"
scripts.test:integration: pnpm run build:test-deps && pnpm --filter ndb2-api test:integration
scripts.test: pnpm run build:test-deps && concurrently -n api-unit,db "pnpm --filter ndb2-api test:unit" "pnpm --filter @offnominal/ndb2-db test" && pnpm --filter ndb2-api test:integration
scripts.test:watch: pnpm run build:test-deps && concurrently "pnpm --filter ndb2-api test:watch" "pnpm --filter @offnominal/ndb2-db test:watch"

author: Jake Robins
